entities.name: CAULIFLOWER
entities.description: Brassica oleracea L. var. botrytis, the target crop of the study

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: An essential micronutrient required for normal growth and development of crop plants

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE
entities.description: Organic fertilizer that provides nutrients and enhances the availability of native and applied nutrients

entities.name: CHEMICAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: An index of plant development that determines the magnitude of yield potential

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The potential magnitude of crop yield determined by chemical composition

entities.name: MEMBRANE INTEGRITY
entities.description: The stability of plant membranes maintained by boron

entities.name: GREENHOUSE STUDIES
entities.description: Experimental approach used to investigate the effects of boron and farmyard manure on cauliflower

entities.name: B-DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Soils lacking sufficient boron collected from the North-West Himalayas

entities.name: NORTH-WEST HIMALAYAS
entities.description: The region in Himachal Pradesh from which B-deficient soils were collected

entities.name: HIMACHAL PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the study's soils were sourced
